title: Draconic Neural Networks
description: A datapack which adds a Hostile Neural Networks data model for the Chaos Guardian from draconic evolution and also edits the data model for the ender dragon to add a dragon heart.
body:
This is a datapack for 1.18.2 which implements a data model from Hostile Neural Networks for the Chaos Guardian from Draconic Evolution, it also implements an altered version of the HNN default Ender Dragon model that adds a DE dragon heart to the loot fabricator options for the ender dragon prediction.

This datapack requires Draconic Evolution and Hostile Neural Networks. 
(HNN is not found on modrinth.)
